title: Pentagram Stat Frame
summary: Swiss-grid statistic anchor — giant number, red accent, growing bars, black data bar. Rational and editorial.

origin.name: Pentagram (Michael Bierut)
origin.reference: pentagram.com — Swiss-grid editorial typography; Hillary Clinton logo system

provenance.transformation: Static PPT showcase → animated hyperframes timeline (Swiss grid sweeps in, giant typographic anchor bleeds off-edge, bar chart grows, black data bar slides up) built as original CSS keyframes. Pentagram's signature #E63946 red is retained as the recognisable brand cue; original sample data. No upstream source code copied verbatim.
